items.headline: Jayson Tatum, Nikola Jokic Named NBA's Players Of Week 23
items.blurb: Jayson Tatum, Nikola Jokic Named NBA's Players Of Week 23 — Jayson Tatum and Nikola Jokic have been named the NBA's Players of the Week for Week 23. Tatum averaged 25.7 points, 9.7 rebounds and 6.7 assists as the Boston Celtics went 3-0.
